== Notes for [[Item:Q107905|Q107905]] ==

مرّه

Murrah ibn Ka'b (Arabic: مرة بن كعب‎) ibn Luay ibn Ghalib ibn Fihr ibn Malik is a man from Quraish tribe, supposed to live in the 4th century.

'''He is the sixth-in-line of Muhammad’s grandfathers. He is the common ancestor of Muhammad’s all four grandparents. He is also the common ancestor of six of Muhammad’s eight great-grandparents.'''

His mother was Wahshiya bint Shaiban ibn Muharib ibn Fihr ibn Malik, so his mother was a second cousin of his father.

http://bit.ly/1p4DQ02


----

Source:

https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Murrah_ibn_Ka%27b

Murrah ibn Ka'b (Arabic: مُرَّة ٱبْن كَعْب) ibn Luay ibn Ghalib ibn Fihr ibn Malik was a man from Quraysh tribe, supposed to have lived in the 4th century.[1] He was the sixth-in-line of Muhammad's grandfathers. He is the common ancestor of all four of Muhammad's grandparents. He is also the common ancestor of six of Muhammad's eight great-grandparents. He is also the common ancestor of Muhammad and his friend Abu Bakr.








----


----

Lineage of Zubayr ibn Awwam who descended from Asad ibn Abd al-Uzza. < [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Asad_ibn_Abd_al-Uzza Wikipedia] >

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000003382397676

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
